headline: Swiss intelligence names Russia the top threat for first time in 2026 security report
summary: The Federal Intelligence Service's annual report designates Russia as Switzerland's greatest threat and warns the security situation has considerably deteriorated.

headline: Switzerland breaks all-time June heat record as Basel hits ~38C; Geneva halts outdoor work at 13:00
summary: A heatwave set a new June temperature record surpassing 36.9C from 1947; Geneva ordered outdoor work stopped from 1pm.

headline: Huber+Suhner rides the data-centre boom
summary: The Appenzell industrial group's shares have surged on massive data-centre investment in connectivity components.

headline: Older men who eat fish carry highest PFAS burden, Unisante study finds
summary: A Unisante study found PFAS concentrations highest in older men and frequent fish consumers in Switzerland.

headline: Twin earthquakes M7.2 and M7.5 strike northern Venezuela, at least 164 dead
summary: Back-to-back quakes off the Caribbean coast on 24 June killed at least 164 and injured nearly 1,000, with building collapses in Caracas.

headline: US Supreme Court clears way for government to block asylum seekers at border
summary: The court allowed the administration to bar asylum seekers at the southern border while litigation continues.

headline: Bayer wins major glyphosate case at US Supreme Court
summary: The US Supreme Court handed Bayer a favourable ruling in long-running Roundup/glyphosate litigation.

headline: Lebanon-Israel talks advance in Washington as Israeli strikes kill three in Lebanon
summary: Rubio praised progress in Washington-mediated de-escalation talks while Israeli fire killed three in Lebanon, a ceasefire breach.

headline: Iran-US friction over Strait of Hormuz hardens into competing claims
summary: Rubio said Gulf states reject Iranian Hormuz tolls; IRGC warned against a new shipping route; Iran rejected unfrozen-funds claim.

headline: CISA adds three CVSS-10.0 Ubiquiti UniFi OS flaws under active exploitation to KEV
summary: CVE-2026-34908/34909/34910 (all CVSS 10.0) in UniFi OS added to CISA KEV on 23 June as actively exploited.

headline: Lantronix EDS5000 code injection CVE-2025-67038 (CVSS 9.8) added to KEV
summary: An unauthenticated code-injection flaw in the Lantronix EDS5000 device server added to CISA KEV on 23 June.

headline: Critical unauthenticated command injection in Cacti CVE-2026-40079 (CVSS 9.8)
summary: Cacti 1.2.30 and prior have an unauthenticated OS command injection (9.8) plus stored SQLi CVE-2026-39951 (7.6).

headline: Quest NetVault Backup RCE and auth-bypass cluster (CVSS 8.8)
summary: Multiple SQL-injection RCEs and XSS auth bypasses in Quest NetVault Backup, all rated CVSS 8.8.

headline: GitLab patches access-control and info-disclosure flaws CVE-2026-10086 (CVSS 8.7)
summary: GitLab remediated CVE-2026-10086 (8.7), CVE-2026-12053 (8.6) and CVE-2026-10712 (8.0) across CE/EE.

headline: OpenBSD SysV semaphore use-after-free enables local root CVE-2026-57589 (CVSS 7.4)
summary: A context-switch use-after-free in sysv_sem.c allows local privilege escalation to root through OpenBSD 7.9.

headline: Model Forensics: testing whether concerning behavior reflects misalignment
summary: A forensic protocol uses chain-of-thought reading plus prompt edits to distinguish malign intent from benign confusion.

headline: Natural ungrokking: a model learns a rule then silently unlearns it mid-pretraining
summary: A grammatical rule is learned then reversed within one run with no loss-curve trace, predicted by corpus support frequency.

headline: AMIA: attention layers in tabular foundation models leak membership
summary: A shadow-model-free membership inference attack exploits transformer attention concentration in tabular foundation models.

headline: The Unfireable Safety Kernel: execution-time alignment outside the agent's reach
summary: Proposes an out-of-process authorization kernel for AI agents that inputs cannot disable, with four required properties.

headline: HiReLC: hierarchical RL for joint pruning and quantization of neural nets
summary: Hierarchical RL agents jointly search bitwidth and pruning configs for automated model compression.

headline: SARA: aligning MoE routing to share experts across languages
summary: Semantically anchored routing transfers high-resource-language experts to low-resource languages in sparse MoE models.
